title: TheStoneAndTheSword
description: An op stone and  the sword you have 1 very op weapon
body:
# About this modpack
## "stone?"
Is it really stone it sounds like grass being placed but it looks like stone i wonder ;)
## "Demon sword"
A sword crafted from the weird stone possesing infinite damage but it cannot surpass invulnerability
#  credits
 If u wanna make a kubejs addon u can watch this tutorial [Tutorial that taught me](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xhJJbNJjics)
